Recommended Flow

A guided path through the lab
01

Orbit & inspect

Open the 3D cutaway and click every pulsing marker.

02

Dissolve the skin

Use the X-ray control and layer toggles to reveal systems.

03

Operate the rigs

Fly the controls, run the 4-stroke, feed fuel, power the bus.

04

Pass the checkrides

Clear all six exams to unlock your certificate.

3D Cutaway Explorer

Drag to orbit, scroll to zoom. Dissolve the skin with the X-ray control, toggle any system to reveal it inside the airframe, and click a marker for the full breakdown.

Systems Simulators

Live rigs modelled on the real aircraft — instruments, gauges and airflow that respond to every input in real time.

Scenarios

Checkride

Six oral exams, one per system. Score the pass mark or better to sign off each system. Clear all six to release the airframe and unlock your certificate.

Practical Exam
